title: AI Financial Coach
body: Get personalized financial advice with our new AI-powered coach. Choose between Eco, Plus, and Pro modes for different levels of conversation depth.

title: Meal Planner
body: Plan your weekly meals and automatically generate shopping lists with cost estimates. Helps you stay on budget while eating well.

title: Savings Goals Tracking
body: Set savings targets with deadlines and track your progress. Visualize how close you are to achieving each goal.

title: Expense Trends & Insights
body: New charts and analytics to help you understand your spending patterns over time. Identify trends and optimize your budget.
